title: Prolonged artificial respiration
abstract: K., 40 years old, was admitted on July 26, 1968 with complaints of numbness of the whole body, difficulty swallowing, lack of air, palpitations, pain in the neck, a feeling of fear of death. Ill for 5 days. In April, May, June 1968, he worked in the forest and repeatedly removed the ticks embedded in the skin.
